steps.title: Extract and interpret the y-intercept
steps.content:
The function is $f(x) = -5x + 30$. The y-intercept is the value when $x = 0$:
$$f(0) = -5(0) + 30 = 30$$
In this context, $x = 0$ means no popsicles have been made yet, so 30 fluid ounces is the amount of juice Caleb had before he started making popsicles.

steps.title: Match to the correct interpretation
steps.content: The y-intercept of 30 represents the initial juice amount, not a per-item rate. Choice C states that Caleb had approximately 30 fluid ounces of juice when he began to make the popsicles, which matches our interpretation of the y-intercept. That matches choice C — C is correct.
